name: action-button
role: Production button primitive — the foundational interactive element. Five intents (primary / secondary / ghost / destructive / link), four sizes (xs / sm / md / lg), eight microstates (default / hover / active / focus / focus-visible / disabled / loading / selected). Supports icon-only, icon-leading, and icon-trailing compositions. Renders as semantic <button> or <a> depending on whether the consumer provides an href attribute.

polymorphic.asAnchor: when an `href` attribute is provided, render as <a> not <button>

meta.minHitTarget: 44x44 CSS pixels — enforced via min-height + min-width on all sizes (xs included)
meta.loadingBehavior: preserve visible width; replace label with spinner; aria-busy='true'; aria-live='polite'

ariaPatterns.disabled: prefer aria-disabled='true' over the disabled attribute when consumer wants focus retained (so screen-reader announces 'dimmed' instead of skipping entirely)
ariaPatterns.selected: for selected microstate use aria-pressed='true' (toggle button) or role='option' + aria-selected (listbox option)

meta.reducedMotion: transition collapses to 0ms when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce

intents.primary: Solid filled — single most-emphasized CTA per surface
intents.ghost: Transparent with text-color label — low-emphasis chrome action
intents.destructive: Solid filled with --critical — irreversible action; pairs with confirmation prompt
intents.link: Inline text with underline-on-hover — sits inline with prose

name: button-group
role: Horizontal composition of action-buttons that share a visual unit. Two registers — connected (segmented control / radio-group style; first + last buttons get outer radius, middle buttons collapse to zero, internal borders deduplicated) and gapped (visually separate buttons separated by space-2). Used for toolbar action clusters, view switchers, paginators, segmented controls.

ariaPatterns.segmented: use role='radiogroup' when functioning as a single-select; each button gets role='radio' + aria-checked
ariaPatterns.toolbar: use role='toolbar' + aria-label when functioning as a chrome action cluster

meta.keyboardNav: arrow keys move focus between buttons in connected register; Tab moves focus past the group as a unit
meta.connectedBehavior: first child rounds left-radius only; last child rounds right-radius only; middle children radius=0; internal vertical borders set to border-recede so the seam reads as a divider not a stroke
